dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires manual channel identification which cannot be fully automated. Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for trending channel upper/lower zones. ADX_14 > 25 confirms downtrend presence. Entry occurs when price approaches upper resistance (dc_upper), exit at lower support (dc_lower). This is a simplified mechanical interpretation of the manual channel trading concept.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires manual channel identification which cannot be fully automated. Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for trending channel upper/lower zones. ADX_14 > 25 confirms downtrend presence. Entry occurs when price approaches upper resistance (dc_upper), exit at lower support (dc_lower). This is a simplified mechanical interpretation of the manual channel trading concept.

source_rule_text: In a downward trending channel, sell short in the upper zone and cover the short in the lower zone; buying in the lower zone is not recommended as trades are safest when entered in the direction of the trend.
